description: Overview dashboard for the Pipeline application covering HTTP requests, BullMQ jobs, and database operations
title: Pipeline Overview

4789176f-8aaa-40da-83f7-68fa152c0449.name: service.name
4789176f-8aaa-40da-83f7-68fa152c0449.queryValue: SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'service.name') AS `service.name` FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4_1day WHERE (metric_name = 'signoz_calls_total') AND (unix_milli >= (toUnixTimestamp(now() - toIntervalDay(1)) * 1000)) GROUP BY `service.name`

b2c3d4e5-f6a7-8901-bcde-f12345678901.name: deployment.environment
b2c3d4e5-f6a7-8901-bcde-f12345678901.queryValue: SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') AS `deployment.environment` FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4_1day WHERE (metric_name = 'signoz_calls_total') AND (unix_milli >= (toUnixTimestamp(now() - toIntervalDay(1)) * 1000)) GROUP BY `deployment.environment`
